item.title: Time for yet another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
that's so cool, how do you even make something like that?
guess they hit the space bar by accident
what am i missing here?
yes indeed it is
i plan on doing this.
as is tradition
why are the earths kissing?
mmm hmm
ugh, that show is always on
fair warning
i kinda want it
wait what
no thank you?
don't talk so loud she's listening
those hats need to make a comeback
please
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Siskel and Ebert's transformation about Jim Carrey
item.description: Have you ever wanted to try D&D but never found a good way to do it or have wanted a little more D&D in your life? I'm part of a great D&D Discord server that is safe, inclusive, and open to veterans and newbies alike. We have text-only games and voice games for all levels of character and player experience, mostly one-shots but some longer campaigns, as well. If you would like to check us out, the link is below. You can come and make whatever character you want, play in games, roleplay in our inn, or just chat out-of-character with likeminded people in a chill and accepting environment. https://discord.gg/forgotten-lands
item.dc:creator: adjacentengels

We have text-only games and voice games for all levels of character and player experience, mostly one-shots but some longer campaigns, as well. If you would like to check us out, the link is below. Jesus!
Judging by some of the designs, it might be Pictish
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
always I wanna be with you, make believe with you and live in harmony, harmony, oh love!
ngl that goes hard.
it autism
oh shit
I see them everywhere
'Atsuneh Mikoo
dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance
:D
The 80s was a wild time.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging

item.title: The Man of the Hole. The last of the Tanaru.
item.description: This guy had his whole tribe killed off my mercenaries hired by cattle ranchers. He lived alone until his death in 2022, attacking anyone who came near. "It is not known what language the Man of the Hole spoke, what his people called themselves, or what his name was." Fucking legend. Hope you found your peace. https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Man_of_the_Hole
item.dc:creator: baals

item.title: Eldritch Nursery Rhymes
item.description: Sauce: DrawerofDrawings, on Instagram. Screenshotted and cropped for your convenience. Shit all kinda sucks right now, all around. Check in on your friends. Tell people you love them. Punch a Nazi in the face. Make sure that you actually get rest during your down time, and try to avoid falling into the spiral. You got this. Most Viral Edit: Dang, y’all. Brought a smile to my face. I appreciate all of you wonderful weirdos, and it would make my day to see monkey gifs, they’re my favorite little rascals. Be kind to others, and ffs, be kind to yourselves. The world is hard enough without you being on your own side. Vote. Edit edit: @14367 with the full comic in one post in the comments, go upvote the nicer formatting!
item.dc:creator: RorytheRedKing

item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: I'm making a free public campaign
item.description:
Hi all. So, by now, many of you have probably seen some of my homemade DnD projects, like my UV crystals and such, but I've never posted about this on Imgur before. I am running a large scale campaign for 2 groups at the moment. It's a complete world/continent that the players can explorer fully. The final campaign should have enough content for years of monthly, maybe even weekly, sessions. I am putting quite a lot of work into this campaign. For example, both my groups are very interested in the lore of the world and they like to solve puzzles and read, so I have written several in-game books that I hand out to my players. I also create my own puzzles, props, and of course quests, locations, backstories, timelines, etc. Since I am putting so much work into it, I would like other people to benefit from it as well. Therefor I upload everything I make to my Patreon where it's all available for free for everyone who wants to use it. All the books, the quests, the props (the 3D files at least) along with instructions and notes on how to make it work. I'm also creating a video series on my YT channel where I go through the entire campaign, bit by bit and explain everything that is needed to run the campaign for your own group.
My campaign is called Mists of Eldoria. It takes the players to a mysterious continent that’s been hidden by magical mists for over a thousand years. They’ll board The Dawnstrider, the only ship that can make it through the fog, and set off to explore this forgotten land filled with ancient secrets, powerful magic, and plenty of intrigue. As they dig deeper, they’ll start to uncover the truth about the mists and the legendary sorcerer, Taldor Vex, who still has a grip on Eldoria’s fate. It’s up to the players to navigate dangerous factions, uncover lost lore, and face a hidden threat that’s been pulling the strings for centuries. It's still in the early stages, but so far, my groups have had about 7 months of 1-2 sessions per month out of the content that is currently available. If you would like to check it out, feel free to do so: https://www.patreon.com/masterful_dungeons https://youtu.be/cbQph-RzTfQ If you decide to use any of it, I would be very happy to hear how it went with your group.
item.dc:creator: WeaselBandit

item.title: Things seen this week during structural assessments!
item.description:
This deck has suffered a catastrophic failure. Several issues were not properly addressed, leading to its failure, and now complete remediation is required.
There is extensive wood rot and termite damage throughout. It also lacks essential components like a ledger, metal joist hangers, and any supplemental support.
The homeowner attempted to secure the failing deck to the white wooden posts you see here with just a few nails, but this effort failed. Now, the deck has collapsed, and ropes and wires were used as an attempt to continue to hold it together, which isn’t effective.
The same property with the failed deck also has a shared cinderblock wall that is failing. The neighbor added a ton of dirt to the area, and since this wall wasn’t initially designed to be a retaining wall, it couldn’t handle the pressure.
A cinderblock retaining wall was built around this electrical vault on a slope. This is an issue because when it rains, water will accumulate in this area with no escape route. Without proper drainage, this creates the potential for a serious safety hazard.
We’re sure at this point everyone knows how we feel about wood sitting directly on dirt. *Shudders* For those who don’t, when wood is in direct contact with dirt, it can deteriorate faster. It can lead to rot, decay, and potential termite damage—ultimately compromising the integrity of the entire structure.
After one of the most recent earthquakes in Los Angeles, we got a call about a concrete building with an imminent punching-shear issue in several areas. Punching shear happens when a concentrated load presses down on a small section of the slab, causing the area to give way and "punch" through.
Due to the severity of the issue, our engineers and crews responded within 36 hours, deploying an emergency shoring solution to prevent a potential collapse. Thank you for joining us, we hope you enjoyed! Check out our Instagram for more exciting content, and we'll see you next Tuesday at 2 pm! https://www.instagram.com/alphastructural/
item.dc:creator: AlphaStructural

item.title: Marcellus Williams executed after two decades on death row
item.description: Marcellus Williams was executed on Tuesday night in the US state of Missouri after spending more than two decades on death row. Williams, who had two previous executions stayed, maintained he was innocent in the 1998 fatal stabbing of Felicia Gayle in a St Louis suburb, and a wide swath of people had opposed his death sentence. An attorney representing Williams argued there was racial discrimination in selecting jurors and that DNA evidence in the case was mishandled. Williams was denied a last-minute reprieve from the US Supreme Court, after Missouri's top court and governor rejected his clemency requests early this week. In a rare move, the three liberal justices on the US Supreme Court - Sonia Sotomayor, Elena Kagan, and Ketanji Brown Jackson - said on Tuesday they disagreed with the conservative majority and would have granted a stay. They did not give a reason. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cz9p518j0nqo
item.dc:creator: nobodyspecial995
